name: digeguigui
description: Global reptile & exotic pet knowledge base MCP server — 633 species, AI identification, genetics calculator, 12-dimension care, health diagnosis, pricing, and provenance verification.

tools.name: search_species
tools.description: Search reptile species by Chinese name, Latin name, or common nickname

tools.name: get_species_profile
tools.description: Get full species profile: taxonomy, 12-dimension care params, pricing, aliases, conservation status

tools.name: identify_turtle
tools.description: AI-powered turtle identification from image (base64), with confidence scoring

tools.name: estimate_value
tools.description: Estimate market value based on species, morph genes, and grade

tools.name: genetics_calculator
tools.description: Punnett square genetics calculator for reptile morph breeding

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Symptom-based diagnosis for reptile/exotic pet diseases with treatment plans

tools.name: search_by_traits
tools.description: Reverse search: find species by care requirements (temperature, size, diet, difficulty)

tools.name: verify_provenance
tools.description: Verify exotic pet digital identity: scan anchor ID, return species, birth date, Git proof hash
